summary: Add sidebar theme settings, department color chips, remove redundant refresh buttons, and synchronize project owner assignments with platform roles.

notes: Organizations can store an optional color_token used by approval-center department chips.
Project owner and department-owner assignments now synchronize user_roles to lead or manager while preserving admin/director.
psa_save_project invokes psa_sync_project_platform_roles after saving owner configuration, and existing project owner assignments are backfilled during migration.
Sidebar bottom actions now expose icon-only Settings and Logout buttons.
Theme settings support light, dark, and system modes.
Approval-center department cells show optional low-saturation department chips.
Redundant manual refresh buttons were removed from project list, employees, dashboard, and approval-center surfaces.
Selected timesheet projects and approval task project labels stay concise by favoring project names.

verification: Run static project-role platform sync migration coverage check.
Run deploy/scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh on production with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.11.
Run scripts/smoke-frontend-render.mjs against https://xpjs.asia/ with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.11.
known_warnings: Vite still warns that some chunks are larger than 500 kB.
Git may warn that LF will be converted to CRLF on this Windows workstation.
